---
title: &TITLE Giovanni Maria Francesco La Scala 
last: La scala
first: Giovanni Maria Francesco
people_group: "phdstudent"
email: "giovanni.lascala@unitn.it"
education:
  - M.S. Mechatronics Engineering | University of Trento | 2025  <br> B.S. Cybernetic Engineering | University of Palermo | 2022
subtitle: "PhD Candidate in System Engineering"
description: ""
project: "neu4mes"
affiliation: University of Trento
# image: avatar.jpg
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/130652685?v=4
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  # sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about: 
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/130652685?v=4
  # image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:giovanni.lascala@unitn.it
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub 
      href: https://github.com/Giolasca
    - icon: globe2
      text: Website 
      href: https://mattiapzz.github.io/
  #   - icon: linkedin
  #   - text: Google Scholar
  #     icon: mortarboard 
  #     href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_csJIOYAAAAJ&hl=it&oi=ao
---

<hr>


:::{#about}
Giovanni Maria Francesco La Scala is a PhD student in System Engineering at the University of Trento working on
development of Model Structured Neural Network for modeling estimation and control of an aerial drone.

He received the BSc from the University of Palermo in Cybernetic Engineering with focus in Mechatronics in 2022 while the MSc in Mechatronics Engineering from the University of Trento focusing on Robotics and Electronics in 2025. He is now a PhD student.


## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::
## Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
